name: Ieva Smidt (Finance Director)
subject: This is not good
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
| Super Tuesday In:
---
[ ](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRXFrUnPxFi5MHC9m3rsj75Q&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200224_frs&n=1)
Team — Did you see Bill’s email from yesterday? Our field team is in desperate need of supplies. We’ve been flooded with volunteers in Super Tuesday states and we need to get them everything they need ASAP if we're going to capitalize on our momentum.
[**Can you help us get them the supplies they need by rushing a donation to our Super Tuesday Victory Fund right now?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRXFrUnPxFi5MHC9m3rsj75Q&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200224_frs&n=2)
| [CHIP IN →](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRYt33aOFBkf_gE5jBM-jGr4&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200224_frs&n=3)
---
We’re **_this close_** to bringing down President Trump once and for all, we would hate to come this close and fall short at the finish line.
Thanks for your help,
Ieva
Ieva Smidt
Finance Director,
Weld 2020
\---- Forwarded message ----
**From** : Bill <info@weld2020.org>
**Date** : February 23rd, 2019
**To** : dpwillis67@gmail.com
Super Tuesday In:
---
[ ](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRXFrUnPxFi5MHC9m3rsj75Q&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200224_frs&n=4)
Friend — My team is getting ready to put in our first major supply order for Super Tuesday and we need to raise another $5,000 before midnight tonight to get everything we need.**_We need to make sure this order will include clipboards, pens, paper, and food for our dedicated volunteers who are spending their free time supporting our movement._**
[**Can you chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can right now to help us raise the $5,000 we need to keep our volunteers going?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRXFrUnPxFi5MHC9m3rsj75Q&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200224_frs&n=5)
| [DONATE →](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRYt33aOFBkf_gE5jBM-jGr4&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200224_frs&n=6)
---
Thanks,
Bill
Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200224_frs&n=7).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200224_frs&n=8) or [Facebook](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200224_frs&n=9).

name: Team Franken
subject: It's official
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
Well it's official, team. Mike just submitted his paperwork to the Iowa Secretary of State to run for the U.S. Senate. Our first official fundraising drive ends Saturday.
|
---
| |
---

| | Well it's official, team. Mike was the first to submit his paperwork to the Iowa Secretary of State to run for the U.S. Senate. Our first official fundraising drive ends Saturday. **[Would you help us meet our February goal of $40,000?](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24ec/33365068/4a6d94fe/3f8be4c4/2813635066/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200225_filing_em_fr_all_l1&amount=10")** Mitch and Joni know that Mike is the one candidate in this race who negates everything she ran on: rural upbringing, military experience, and that whole pig thing. [](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24ec/33365068/4a6d94fe/3f8be4c5/2813635066/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200225_filing_em_fr_all_gif&amount=10") We couldn't have done this without your support--from cities to farmland and everywhere in between -- Iowans from all 99 counties came together to make sure Mike had the support he needs. **Now we need you to take the next step. We can beat Joni Ernst in November, but we 're going to need a well-funded campaign to do it. _[Chip in today to get us to the finish line. Even $5 or $10 goes a long way.](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24ec/33365068/4a6d94fe/3f8be4c6/2813635066/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200225_filing_em_fr_all_l2&amount=10")_** | [Chip In >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24ec/33365068/4a6d94fe/3f8be4c7/2813635066/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200225_filing_em_fr_all_btn&amount=10")
---
Thank you,
Team Franken

[Chip In >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24ec/33365068/4a6d94fe/3f8be4c0/2813635066/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200225_filing_em_fr_all_ftrbtn&amount=10")
---

[DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24ec/33365068/4a6d94fe/3f8be4c1/2813635066/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200213_barr_em_fr_all_ftrbtn&amount=10")
---

name: Enrique Pepen, Team Kennedy
subject: a few pics from the weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390396/55b66746/22b1131c/80fce7c/1646790604/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Hey, Enrique here - just wanted to say hello and share two super cute photos with Joe and some future voters. It's been a pretty darn good (and busy) weekend with Joe. On Saturday we traveled to five Democratic Convention Delegate Caucus sites. Had our first community conversation at our Boston office in the heart of Roxbury. Then went to the Dominican Independence Day Celebration in Dedham. [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390396/55b66746/22b1131c/80fce7d/1646790604/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-02-25-enrique&recurring=1&amount=3")[ ](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390396/55b66746/22b1131c/80fce7d/1646790604/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-02-25-enrique&recurring=1&amount=3") (Future voter at the Brockton Caucus) Sunday we were back at it, bright and early with a visit to the Greater Framingham Community Church in Western Mass. Toured the Westborough Sikh Temple. Then capped it all off with a local business tour through Chelsea. [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390396/55b66746/22b1131c/80fce7d/1646790604/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-02-25-enrique&recurring=1&amount=3") (Future voter in Chelsea) When Joe says he is going to show up everywhere, he means it. Almost 300 miles in the car this weekend. Leaving no one out of this process. But for now, I'm going to head home for a quick break before getting back on the road tomorrow. Vamos hacerlo! Enrique _Enrique Pepen
Special Assistant_ _[](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390396/55b66746/22b1131c/80fce7d/1646790604/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-02-25-enrique&recurring=1&amount=3")_ P.S. Here's a pic of me, Jax, and Joe at lunch yesterday. Joe tried his first pupusa [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390396/55b66746/22b1131c/80fce7d/1646790604/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2020-02-25-enrique&recurring=1&amount=3") If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$3](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390396/55b66746/22b1131c/80fce7e/1646790604/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjMifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=2020-02-25-enrique&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$10](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390396/55b66746/22b1131c/80fce7f/1646790604/VEsO/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjEwIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=2020-02-25-enrique&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390396/55b66746/22b1131c/80fce78/1646790604/VEsP/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2020-02-25-enrique&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390396/55b66746/22b1131c/80fce79/1646790604/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2020-02-25-enrique&refcode2=express-buttons")

PO Box 15, Boston, MA 02137.

name: Lexie Kelly
subject: We need to turn up the volume
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| [](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b861/29776869/ab7f814/569f8db2/3197986083/VEsH/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/")
---

| | Hi! Christy's Finance Director, Lexie, here with an important update on the state of our campaign: _We need to raise an extra $5,000 by midnight tonight to meet our budget needs to stay in this fight._ [**Will you make a donation of any size to help us hit our budget goal?**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b861/29776869/ab7f814/569f8db3/3197986083/VEsE/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/christysmith2020?refcode=X_022420_Plea_a&amount=25&recurring=auto") Our election is next Tuesday! Our opponents have all increased their ad buys and we need to match them tete-a-tete to remain competitive. We need to turn up the volume if we're going to win. Unlike them, our race is grassroots-based -- that means real people chipping in what they can in order to change Washington for the better. [**Can I count on you to help fuel this grassroots movement?**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b861/29776869/ab7f814/569f8db3/3197986083/VEsF/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/christysmith2020?refcode=X_022420_Plea_a&amount=25&recurring=auto") Thank you for all you do. _Lexie Kelly_ _Finance Director for Christy Smith for Congress _ [](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b861/29776869/ab7f814/569f8d8c/3197986083/VEsC/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/christysmith2020?refcode=X_022420_Plea_a&amount=25&recurring=auto") |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress.
---|---
|
This email was sent by **[Christy Smith](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b861/29776869/ab7f814/569f8db2/3197986083/VEsD/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/")**
777 S. Figueroa Street, Suite 4050, Los Angeles, CA 90017-5864.

If you no longer want to hear from Christy Smith, [**click here to get off all our lists instantly.**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6b861/29776869/ab7f814/569f8d8d/3197986083/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? name: Chris Putnam
subject: Help us win this Saturday!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PUTNAM FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Friend, We are almost at the finish line! With the election a little over a week away, we need all the help we can get to help Chris win on March 3rd. This Saturday, we are hitting the doors for one last push before the primary election and speaking with voters across the district. Can you help us this weekend?
**Saturday, February 29th, 2020** 10:00 AM **BB &T Bank** 4605 Camp Bowie Blvd
Fort Worth, TX 76107 If you've never blockwalked before, don't worry! We will provide you with all the materials, training, and yard signs you will need. Let us know you are coming by RSVPing on [Facebook](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/1uDjklNU1KkoSN0Lnx5kEA/o7636g07KvwnuPKQ892h2Zc63w) or [shooting us an email](mailto:cody@putnamfortexas.com). **We also need volunteers to help greet voters at the polls on election day! You can sign up to help[by filling out this form. ](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/VzC2FDVp7W5NgsOI3iwepA/o7636g07KvwnuPKQ892h2Zc63w)** If you have any questions about volunteering or voting next week, please email [cody@putnamfortexas.com](mailto:cody@putnamfortexas.com) for more information. We hope to see you soon! \- Team Putnam

clean_body: | Friend, We are almost at the finish line! With the election a little over a week away, we need all the help we can get to help Chris win on March 3rd. This Saturday, we are hitting the doors for one last push before the primary election and speaking with voters across the district. Can you help us this weekend? Saturday, February 29th, 2020 10:00 AM BB &T Bank 4605 Camp Bowie Blvd Fort Worth, TX 76107 If you've never blockwalked before, don't worry! We will provide you with all the materials, training, and yard signs you will need. Let us know you are coming by RSVPing on or mailto:cody@putnamfortexas.com. We also need volunteers to help greet voters at the polls on election day! You can sign up to help If you have any questions about volunteering or voting next week, please email mailto:cody@putnamfortexas.com for more information. We hope to see you soon! \- Team Putnam * PAID FOR BY PUTNAM FOR CONGRESS

name: Kevin Sheekey, Bloomberg 2020
subject: A fatal error
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020
body:
It's more clear than ever that Sanders is the opponent to beat.

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=86523c17f88b4f6d8caa100ccf21e825&_e=snntSthBhvVzIXP9QDfED7LzgcIMv5k4Ts_LgIrmB9FAfHnhmdNbyUKmfXrzqBaOuKhXUROAIzz2JWNvcAq8xGuXAMM09xhz61wbYcd8ikXMN3Bm_imbSYN_xadHKql9hU71ilOFghQbw8eGSkFyzN1qvoIN4VC8sBaeujnqqZyv4gjxJw_ibq8Tja4YAjqXHZqSB5L-y6fNj8vtsG-F5s3TbFu0fZj4ee9BVnpfjkubznMqHtPEta1tCavMrnpZL-IjSdh-TJgEjUMHG7G-92iR7fQaqQ_8q_ELizP8VaDHP9tQB4mQ254IMYxSCM073QfgpjOdC0c96STrwI3h_LPJfA2NhnYKx4PMnK3w0m3qKcU1yvJAtjFETGkA-2b-) Hi friend, this is Kevin, Mike's campaign manager -- I want to share an update after the results of the Nevada caucuses on Saturday. Bernie Sanders' win in Nevada puts him on track to emerge from this fragmented field with an insurmountable delegate lead. Mike wasn't on the ballot in Nevada, but he will be on ballots across the country on March 3 -- and it's more clear than ever that Sanders is the opponent to beat. As Mike says, if we choose a candidate who appeals to a small base it will be a fatal error. We are going to need Democrats, Independents, and Republicans to defeat Trump -- and attacking your own party is no way to get started. [**That's why I'm asking you, friend, to sign up for a volunteer shift so that we can keep growing our coalition, make a strong showing, and be ready to beat Donald Trump in November.**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=86523c17f88b4f6d8caa100ccf21e825&_e=snntSthBhvVzIXP9QDfED7LzgcIMv5k4Ts_LgIrmB9FAfHnhmdNbyUKmfXrzqBaOuKhXUROAIzz2JWNvcAq8xGuXAMM09xhz61wbYcd8ikXMN3Bm_imbSYN_xadHKql9hU71ilOFghQbw8eGSkFyzN1qvoIN4VC8sBaeujnqqZyzg5H_VbBDYFWtKUMwUjnIQK60AFfEZ-PCdc3G_VBFHOYkxvpYpULtBPBqYQXmUcCJ7_Nf3PsBAtewE7Le0uzHfRFbIw0dOH7bZlCQ9rrDq64o942kciV7uG7k4yfLB_I105OQyd7Zhdd9n6ZAMkwlJDMJxUvuNN368r48N_tO-MIVfEJ7B65J6HWscbDg6_hv4HqSfyJBu1prJFBUPwlo) We know what it takes to win. In fact, last weekend Mike's supporters were out in force -- knocking doors, making calls, texting voters, and talking about the important issues as part of a Weekend of Action across the country. We got some incredible photos showing just how broad this coalition of Americans is. Here are just a few: [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=86523c17f88b4f6d8caa100ccf21e825&_e=snntSthBhvVzIXP9QDfED7LzgcIMv5k4Ts_LgIrmB9FAfHnhmdNbyUKmfXrzqBaOuKhXUROAIzz2JWNvcAq8xGuXAMM09xhz61wbYcd8ikXMN3Bm_imbSYN_xadHKql9hU71ilOFghQbw8eGSkFyzN1qvoIN4VC8sBaeujnqqZzIKhSBvnBbaDIxkY5re4zBF7zE5XYp_hxijK3V6rw5X432cA8FHt6xNNFOpFoWM5BiMugZKJgX9K7PmzCYSpPZlPkr6K-q876-451ONZhnnWA4Rbhq__MbaN2P1r2Z6fodJvWS7wZ5ydB9NvxZQ6rGSiVIisPuQxu1WQBzpE2gJlLLJHVqr5Zsv7Vf8jGal4r5mFeIUqxp20YWe64QlVpf) _Michigan_ [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=86523c17f88b4f6d8caa100ccf21e825&_e=snntSthBhvVzIXP9QDfED7LzgcIMv5k4Ts_LgIrmB9FAfHnhmdNbyUKmfXrzqBaOuKhXUROAIzz2JWNvcAq8xGuXAMM09xhz61wbYcd8ikXMN3Bm_imbSYN_xadHKql9hU71ilOFghQbw8eGSkFyzN1qvoIN4VC8sBaeujnqqZwXunyDN2IYAtlT8w3tHSpVSegj5Xfyf2tDa4t7NKfwRV1OfXoKNXDEEEoM1BY3nObrIJ9Ve1FXWMYWf75_5VDe1N67nFj3qFnLg1Bewz1hzbKYMCy2GaoNYBXDEzUgx8mEnTPM-uzF9f4uhNbuFAXAGS1uWSITYQgGjCq-alo749dKXsxrrxf1rMBN5MTzRvlCQNX00U-ORnrIblJOyN56) _Missouri_ [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=86523c17f88b4f6d8caa100ccf21e825&_e=snntSthBhvVzIXP9QDfED7LzgcIMv5k4Ts_LgIrmB9FAfHnhmdNbyUKmfXrzqBaOuKhXUROAIzz2JWNvcAq8xGuXAMM09xhz61wbYcd8ikXMN3Bm_imbSYN_xadHKql9hU71ilOFghQbw8eGSkFyzN1qvoIN4VC8sBaeujnqqZw9b2BMqJfFjhym5JhGZHODxDyQLxAjZ37QBQlC88PbtNw9o7YSNnEL58X8pwAbP5a9mMLZKfvNY6LrHl5Rs9zavPg_vlzvuGDwUa9QMlmJsilQKVLaSCka3JIYHhLCCCt_9xKjeu_89x0ZP-JFZbTI09cg18wx5PCcQfxf2nxf3F9mgBSLhzVhp9Nqzd59aJdDMQnLq3RsS5up1zMGJbHY) _Texas_ That is how we're going to get the job done. This was never going to be easy -- and the fight is only going to get tougher from here on out. We're expecting to see the attacks ramp up in tomorrow's debate and in the media. But we can't let Sanders take the Democratic nomination, for the simple reason that he can't beat Trump. America needs a candidate who can unite the country, not deepen our divides. Mike's leadership has been tested and proven, and his path forward is clear. He's the candidate who can beat Trump, and you and I are going to have the honor of saying we helped him do it. So how about it? **Pledge to volunteer for Mike today:** [**https://www.mikebloomberg.com/2020/em-woa-43048**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=86523c17f88b4f6d8caa100ccf21e825&_e=snntSthBhvVzIXP9QDfED7LzgcIMv5k4Ts_LgIrmB9FAfHnhmdNbyUKmfXrzqBaOuKhXUROAIzz2JWNvcAq8xGuXAMM09xhz61wbYcd8ikXMN3Bm_imbSYN_xadHKql9hU71ilOFghQbw8eGSkFyzN1qvoIN4VC8sBaeujnqqZyLid-m7sCyT5tEpkO6b3D6-BkziZ08IzKUwDOPyh7gaZuzfUs9DV6VgnczWanhvw_074PCRRccxNQRk_qkdUSmAffWD2NVbsIM0NwZksx-iEzoNp5GH90KGwzGsa8WT2M7J_FasRiHU11KObRMTZBpTReVkDs33xSr8wQd9TTU5hAT6gegJ0f4Agi4rRqhLPmUFGU-mJidG05KqXXLrwMd) I'll see you out there, Kevin Sheekey
Campaign Manager
Bloomberg 2020
---

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=86523c17f88b4f6d8caa100ccf21e825&_e=snntSthBhvVzIXP9QDfED8ucfpkQSCA6OElWF4TR3_mZuadhfjAPOkdCbwhFsngO-fCh8aOsDXf6ooBe8rEbZ4gwN1U2f16UrzrfvQwoUEQpQ0i8or-D_BGDZ_GKxBEecL-4mm9l-MJq_57keGfpMhoOqv36rZpYaqGNoZU1aGKZ6uzEAC4iHz0A80gIAM9qtu0ffpg2kl_qKjBhw_NzLzSEKGWiAoMM7CqNypRu56OxwD86kDBsPE6tIyk_NM3g8pWGLbiZ0wY7Mvhcdpcffg%3D%3D) | | [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=86523c17f88b4f6d8caa100ccf21e825&_e=snntSthBhvVzIXP9QDfED0A6dbW3m3mkgsvYLhsQjXAjpGwUcFlyrxCLm4PVJLS-SbnKvMQEiUZsoTFCPc8DSVcTAmSojitQAr6uMeZHiavTotdt39ztZyg9GrYx4NepE64JlcLw1kPtTOiKD_yZJAPK589JfrSXumM01uBuq6lx4Hhvz3OCXBH4thLVlQHdoDJ23BTcOl6y9R3eudzsAikQeKhYEn0lJni7KgbDK_LjOUxF_elKk8LbUHlY1CXYwo4NM_BX4I_WiScMfjyCZw%3D%3D)

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: Flight 294 to Cabo San Lucas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f236/6cd27893/53f1a880/1586895d/1581844957/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | I can see the brochure already: visit Cabo San Lucas -- sunshine, surf, _cheaper prescription drugs_. Dream getaway? Government-funded medical plan? _Why not both!_ [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f236/6cd27893/53f1a880/1586895a/1581844957/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2020-02-24-rxprices&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") It would be funny if it weren't so alarming. I'm not ready to outsource our health care. Taking Flight 294 to Cabo San Lucas is a great idea for a vacation. It's not a viable long-term health plan. You can't blame Utah for exploring this option. Like every employer and consumer, they're getting buried by high bills for prescription drugs. Big Pharma rips off Americans, charging us way more than they charge in Mexico and other countries. **If our federal government won't fix what's broken,****_get creative_****, right?** **_But I have a better idea than sending Americans to foreign countries. _**I have written legislation to reduce the cost of prescription drugs here at home -- to mandate a maximum price that is no more than the average cost in Canada, Japan, and Europe. This problem is easily solvable _if_ we work together AND are willing to take on the powerful interests that have a stake in keeping things the way they are. (And, as a bonus, if families can actually afford their prescription drugs and health care, maybe they'll be able to save up for an _actual_ vacation!) **I**** _know_****we can get this done. We can fix our broken health care system and take back our country -- but only if all of us who are willing to take on the powerful join together in a grassroots movement to make it happen. Let's make it happen! ** _Jeff_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f236/6cd27893/53f1a880/1586895b/1581844957/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2020-02-24-rxprices&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f236/6cd27893/53f1a880/15868958/1581844957/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2020-02-24-rxprices&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f236/6cd27893/53f1a880/15868959/1581844957/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2020-02-24-rxprices&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2f236/6cd27893/53f1a880/15868956/1581844957/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2020-02-24-rxprices&refcode2=express-buttons")

name: Team Tina
subject: If we miss this goal...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200224-mm7?refcode=em200224-mm7&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") If we fall short of our goal before the end-of-month deadline on Saturday, our campaign will face some tough decisions.

The truth is, missing our target would force us to reexamine our strategy to win in November, reconsider how much staff we can bring on or how many offices we can open, and more.

It would be a huge step backward, to say the least.

Look, we don't even want to think about what would happen if we miss our goal -- and neither does Tina. Instead, we're putting all of our energy into what we will do when we hit our target for the month and put ourselves on track for the quarter.

**So we're asking you to donate any amount that is meaningful to you to help us get there. You pick!** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200224-mm7?refcode=em200224-mm7&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

name: Dr. Manny
subject: Check-Up with Dr. Manny 2/24
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr Manny for U
body:
---
| |
---|---|---
| Happy Monday!

When this campaign started I promised you that I'd be visiting every corner of the state, because I want to represent every corner of our state. I told you I'd be going from Mountain City to Memphis, and everywhere in between, because I believe that the folks of Tennessee should meet their next US Senator. This last week was a good example of what I meant. Thursday I was in Memphis, and Saturday I was in Mountain City, visiting Tipton, Sullivan, and Washington Counties in between. Every part of our beautiful state matters, and when elected, I will continue to travel the state and talk to constituents about the issues that matter. This week, I was so grateful to also have the chance to meet so many of you in Maury, Carter, Hamblen, Greene, and Johnson counties. As I have been traveling across the state and talking with my fellow Tennesseans, the question I get asked the most is, "What are you going to do to stop this illegal immigration crisis?" Easy! I don't think it's right for people to illegally cross our borders unchecked or overstay their visas with no consequences. Giving benefits to those who come here illegally isn’t protecting the rule of law, it is giving away our nation. I’m the son of two LEGAL immigrants. I will support President Trump’s effort to build the wall and support ICE in order to help preserve the American Dream. Lastly, early voting ends tomorrow! Today I will be going to the ballot box to early vote for President Trump to be the Republican primary candidate, just like I did back in 2016. Make sure you look up your local voting location, and let's give President Trump four more years! **News:** I had a great time speaking at the Hamblen County Lincoln-Reagan Day Dinner on Saturday evening! [Watch a video of my speech from the Citizen-Tribune here!](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhtdykyd-olhhkyhhid-y/) **Social Media:** I'm so grateful for the folks that came out to our stop in Carter County this Saturday. We had an overflow crowd of eager conservatives in Elizabethton. I enjoyed speaking about what they want in their next US Senator. Many folks feel neglected by current officials in Washington, but as your next US Senator, I will represent all 95 counties, not just a few. Follow us on [Facebook](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhtdykyd-olhhkyhhid-j/), [Twitter](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhtdykyd-olhhkyhhid-t/), and [Instagram](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhtdykyd-olhhkyhhid-i/)! Also be sure to tag us on social media for your chance to be featured in our next Check-Up with Dr. Manny. We are just under six months until the primary election on August 6th. I can't do this without your support. Together we can make a different kind of difference! Dr. Manny P.S. [W](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhtdykyd-olhhkyhhid-d/)[o](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhtdykyd-olhhkyhhid-h/)[uld you consider chipping in? We can't do this without you, and every donation helps! ](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhtdykyd-olhhkyhhid-k/) [Donate](https://mannysethi.cmail19.com/t/r-l-jhtdykyd-olhhkyhhid-u/) |

name: Billye Aaron
subject: A multigenerational, multiracial movement for change
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
As we celebrate Black History Month, I wanted to share my thoughts as we look to begin a bold new chapter in Georgia and our nation’s history. | |
---

| | **** | | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15398363/162522357/664205141?refcode=em022520-b&refcode2=95c31e17-e457-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWMzMWUxNy1lNDU3LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JmnwyTFol6d5DFpfvofsEPkb-DkZ5R3kJhE3Y0CiAUg=)

---

Friend,

As we celebrate Black History Month, I wanted to share my thoughts as we look to begin a bold new chapter in Georgia and our nation’s history.

My name is Billye Aaron. For many years, my husband Henry (Hank) and I have been deeply involved in the work of the NAACP, as well as initiatives to lift up and educate children in Atlanta and across the country. This work has been my inspiration.

I have had the extraordinary privilege of being an Atlanta public school teacher and an educator at some of Atlanta’s historically black colleges and universities — Spelman College, Morehouse College, and Morris Brown College, where I’ve met brilliant young minds with a vision to change and improve the world.

The energy I feel today, and what I see happening across our state, reminds me of a time when I was younger, when civil rights leaders and political leaders bent the arc of our country’s history toward greater equality and fundamental rights for all.

We face many of the same obstacles now as we did then. Voting rights are under attack. Fair housing, employment, and a college education remain a struggle for too many people, following a Great Recession from which they have yet to fully recover.

But the people are ready for a change. In this election, powered by a multigenerational, multiracial movement, we can make good on the promises that politicians have so often made but too rarely delivered. Voting rights, healthcare, good wages, the right to organize, educating our children, and honoring our teachers all depend on what we do now.

I know that Teresa can deliver on these priorities, but we’ve got to have her back. That is why I am proud to support her, and I hope you will too.

[**Because Teresa does not accept corporate PAC money, she’s relying on grassroots support to power her campaign — and that is why we can trust her to fight for us. Join me in contributing to her campaign today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15398364/162522358/664205141?refcode=em022520-b&refcode2=95c31e17-e457-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWMzMWUxNy1lNDU3LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JmnwyTFol6d5DFpfvofsEPkb-DkZ5R3kJhE3Y0CiAUg=)

name: Rick Kennedy
subject: Closing Argument - Part 2
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
Professional Experience and Skills

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15398896/162527624/-1907457918?refcode=02142020_em_hdr&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTFiN2FiMC1lNTU3LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LPozaPEUhequo-LoC0gxFdanuuaHz80laP12cQI93GY=)

Dear Friend, I'll continue my closing arguments as to why my skill set, experience, and positions make me the best candidate to take on and beat the eventual Republican nominee. As I said yesterday - Congress has not been up to the task of tackling our most divisive issues because too few members are problem solvers focused on improving the quality of life for their constituents and all Americans. I've been a software engineer, a manager, and a project manager for 35 years. I've led teams solving complex problems all over the world. Over the span of that career I've learned that good ideas come from everywhere. So, I'm not looking for Democratic solutions to our challenges, nor am I looking for Republican solutions. I'm looking for effective and achievable solutions to improve the quality of life for Central Texans and all Americans. But analytical and leadership skills aren't enough. In addition to being able to understand issues and possible solutions, gain consensus, and simply manage a process, I can clearly articulate my positions and frame them in a manner that encourages engagement and conversation. For examples I encourage you to check out the [KBTX/KWTX Congressional Candidate Forum (first half-hour)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15398897/162527625/-549250276?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTFiN2FiMC1lNTU3LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LPozaPEUhequo-LoC0gxFdanuuaHz80laP12cQI93GY=&emci=fb2e81fb-d157-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=f51b7ab0-e557-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=10438639) and the [KAMU Meet the Candidates Forum (1:04 through 1:20 minute marks)](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15398898/162527626/-549250276?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNTFiN2FiMC1lNTU3LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LPozaPEUhequo-LoC0gxFdanuuaHz80laP12cQI93GY=&emci=fb2e81fb-d157-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&emdi=f51b7ab0-e557-ea11-a94c-00155d039e74&ceid=10438639). While I decry publicity hounds, the ability to (properly!) use the media to both communicate with constituents and influence public opinion is a critical skill for a member of Congress. One week to primary day - have you voted yet? We've got our billboards up and our radio campaign kicks off this morning. We're down to closing arguments and Get Out the Vote activities. clean_body: | | | | | | Patriot, I wanted to make sure you were able to catch my segment on The View last week and to read my message. We have had a huge outpouring of support, but I know we can do better! Can you step up and donate $5 to show the mainstream media how powerful "the Deplorables" can be? == Best, Matt Gaetz Sent from my iPhone, please excuse typos \------Forwarded Message------ Subject: I ruffled some feathers on "The View" From: Matt Gaetz Date: Friday, February 21, 2020 at 9:25 AM Patriot, On Thursday, I went on The View and took on Joy Behar, Whoopi Goldberg, and the rest of the left-wing hosts on a number of issues, and I did not pull any punches. I stood up for the Silent Majority who are routinely mocked by the social elite on The View every day. Check out the segment here: | == | I will not stand by and watch coastal elites demonize middle America and the true hard-working people of our country. We need to band together and show these far-left TV talking heads that we won't back down from defending our values. I want to prove to the mainstream media across the country that we can mobilize the "Deplorables" into a grassroots army that can't be stopped. == | | | == | | | == | God bless America, | == | Matt Gaetz | == == | | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ | Copyright (C) 2019 Friends of Matt Gaetz, All rights reserved. name: Pragya Nandini
subject: Join us at our petitioning kick-off event this Saturday!
body:
Peter,

Today’s the day! I know you’ve been receiving plenty of emails from Adem and our team lately, but I just wanted to send around a short reminder that today, February 25th, is the official start of petitioning!

Here’s the rundown: Every candidate needs a certain amount of petition signatures to qualify for a spot on the ballot, so unless we’re able to reach enough of our voters and collect their signatures for Adem, all of our hard work will have been for nothing. It’s absolutely crucial that we get off to a strong start, and the best thing you can do right now is RSVP to our petitioning kick-off event this Saturday! https://www.mobilize.us/adem2020/event/239637/

CLICK HERE TO RSVP https://www.mobilize.us/adem2020/event/239637/

Details are below -- we’re predicting a huge turnout, so we hope to see you there!

When: Saturday, February 29th, at 11:00 AM
Where: 767 Washington Ave., Brooklyn, NY 11238

Best,
Pragya Nandini

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

name: Mitch McConnell
subject: President Trump and I are ALL IN
body:
I wanted to quickly tell you about a fantastic conservative Senate candidate

Peter,

I wanted to quickly tell you about a fantastic conservative Senate candidate, Bill Hagerty.

Bill is running for Tennessee’s open U.S. Senate seat and he’s already earned the endorsements of President Donald Trump, Ambassador Nikki Haley, and Donald Trump Jr.

Can you join us in supporting Bill Hagerty by making a donation right now? [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/mitch-mcconnell?amount=50&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mitch%20mcconnell]

Donate $25 right now >>> [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/mitch-mcconnell?amount=25&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mitch%20mcconnell]

Bill served as Trump’s Tennessee Victory Chair in 2016, as a senior member of the Trump transition team, and then as President Trump’s Ambassador to Japan.

Democrats spent over $43 MILLION in Tennessee last cycle and we can’t let Bill fall behind the liberal money machine. That’s why it’s critical Bill has your support right now. Donate right now. [https://secure.winred.com/teamhagerty/mitch-mcconnell?amount=50&utm_source=housefile&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=mitch%20mcconnell]

Thank you for your support.

Mitch McConnell

Wow -- **two recently-released polls show Democrat Amy McGrath is TIED with Mitch McConnell in the Kentucky Senate race.**
Kentucky is fairly conservative, but these polls are proof that when we run -- and support -- strong Democrats, even in the reddest states, we can win.
Republicans will use these polls as an excuse to attack Amy and smear her campaign. Amy's counting on you to help keep up the momentum and withstand whatever McConnell and his buddies throw at her.
That's why we have to ask:** [please give $3 or as much as you can to stand with Amy and send Mitch McConnell packing once and for all.](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc48b/2a380d31/2265c2ca/f08eb0/3882318301/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0bWNncmF0aCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAwMjI1X213aDRBTUcxX25hIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4mcgrath?refcode=e20200225_mwh4AMG1_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=auto")**
**McConnell has a deep bench of corporate special interests and GOP mega-donors behind him, ready to do his bidding. Amy 's not afraid of them but she will need your help to take them on. **

| | | Friends,

President Trump has spent the last three years FIGHTING for us.

Under the Trump presidency, we’ve experienced an era of record-low unemployment – _not just for workers in general,**but also for women and minorities.**
_
He’s negotiated new trade agreements that put **AMERICA FIRST🇺🇸**.

He’s **eliminated** threats to democracy.

President Trump has kept his promise to **Make America Great Again** ... _in spite of the shameful leftist impeachment efforts. _

Most importantly, our President loves our great country – and he knows how crucial it is to keep it **RED.**

But the truth is, [**President Trump needs strong Illinois to continue to fight alongside him.**](https://jerryforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7cd9c63b39d00967cc49e3ffc&id=b2b8c42891&e=9b692867fa)

It’s critical that we defeat Lauren Underwood and flip this district **RED** in November.

[**President Trump will need all the help he can get and I’m running to win and ensure we have a strong House to promote his America First Agenda.**](https://jerryforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7cd9c63b39d00967cc49e3ffc&id=06442b7f15&e=9b692867fa)

Sincerely, Jerry Evans

subject: 🎉 Help us celebrate Tim Kaine 🎉
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Sign our card and celebrate Tim!
|
---
| | | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d5f4/53d9897e/53122466/1c89be62/1154996250/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-kainebday")
---
Derek --

It's our friend Tim Kaine's birthday tomorrow! We're reaching out, because we'd like to get as many of Mark's supporters as possible to send Tim birthday messages.

**[Will you send a birthday message to Tim?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d5f4/53d9897e/53122466/1c89be62/1154996250/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-kainebday")**

Tim and Mark are working hard together in the Senate, fighting for benefits for our veterans, advocating for affordable housing across the Commonwealth, and making sure that every Virginian has access to affordable health care. There's certainly a lot going on, but today we're taking some time to celebrate all of Tim's accomplishments.

**[Sign our card and celebrate Tim!](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d5f4/53d9897e/53122466/1c89be62/1154996250/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-kainebday")**

Thanks for helping out.

-- Team Warner

****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d5f4/53d9897e/53122466/1c89be61/1154996250/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ3OSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200225db__479__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")****
---

|
---

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Paul Hart
subject: Bringing our voices to Washington
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rita Hart for Iowa
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/gqKpOnZFdCWWKm7jLt67u9Uq5iti6PFhapnJt76aa5g=/HgCsjxyuArAXtdYeQxyn5v3_TgQ4BtGextTMZUdR6sw=?refcode=200225-email) Peter, I've been traveling around the district with Rita the last couple of weeks and I want to take a moment to tell you why it's so important that Rita wins in November. I know Rita truly cares about what our community thinks. It's why she'll talk to everyone from students to seniors, veterans and farmers, Republicans and Democrats about their priorities and how Rita can best represent them. This isn't about red vs. blue, our race is shaping up to be about someone who will take the time to listen to Iowans vs. someone who will only listen to partisan leadership in Washington. **[That's what is at stake in this election. Rita is the best and only person in this race to truly embody our community, from her experience as a State Senator to her work on our family farm. Donate today before the end of the month so we're prepared for whatever March throws our way.](https://act.myngp.com/el/gqKpOnZFdCWWKm7jLt67u9Uq5iti6PFhapnJt76aa5g=/h7gjkGgiji7xBbh-waPOY_9crX18S3wvixWJkRToUcA=?refcode=200225-email)** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/gqKpOnZFdCWWKm7jLt67u9Uq5iti6PFhapnJt76aa5g=/h7gjkGgiji7xBbh-waPOY_9crX18S3wvixWJkRToUcA=?refcode=200225-email&amount=10) Your support keeps this campaign running. We need resources to be able to travel around and sit down with folks to hear their concerns about the future. It's what Rita's best at, but it takes time and money. **[Donate today to help fuel Rita's listening tour. Rita is the one person who can bring our voices to Washington because she's so dedicated to hearing them now. We need her on our side in Congress.](https://act.myngp.com/el/gqKpOnZFdCWWKm7jLt67u9Uq5iti6PFhapnJt76aa5g=/h7gjkGgiji7xBbh-waPOY_9crX18S3wvixWJkRToUcA=?refcode=200225-email)** Paul Hart | ******_**Rita Hart is a lifelong Iowan, farmer, 20-year educator, former State Senator and candidate for Congress in Iowa 's 2nd Congressional District. Help us send Rita to Washington by making a donation today!**_****** | ******[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.myngp.com/el/gqKpOnZFdCWWKm7jLt67u9Uq5iti6PFhapnJt76aa5g=/HgCsjxyuArAXtdYeQxyn5v3_TgQ4BtGextTMZUdR6sw=?refcode=200225-email)******

| | Friend, Precinct caucuses are this evening - **would you consider bringing the resolution below to help us add common-sense gun violence prevention to the official DFL platform?** This year House DFLers are working to enact criminal background checks on all gun sales and extreme risk protection orders to keep guns out of the hand of people who've proven themselves to be dangerous. These measures were blocked in the Republican-controlled Senate last legislative session and will likely encounter the same fate this year. It is important for DFLers to stand together and turn our values into the base of our DFL platform. **We won 't stop working until common-sense gun violence prevention is the law and our state is a safer place to live for everyone.** We need your help. Will you join us? Thank you, **Melissa Hortman** Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives [**P.S. if you need help finding your precinct caucus location, you can look it up here.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oaGNtHgcHQZC-h01nYZOZd0U6V2dz89ByzJFiDvmuLA=/dC0ciGtribQuZlpWIxyyELqfYIBrxbBJMLuAt6e_rEs=) [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/oaGNtHgcHQZC-h01nYZOZd0U6V2dz89ByzJFiDvmuLA=/-J5Utuj1kg5cqP6ppYlOqHjlzitgCBNe9dYW6uWnD3U=?refcode=022520)

name: Sandy Smith
subject: The Dems took off the mask
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SANDY SMITH FOR CONGRESS INC
body:

Dear Peter,
I am Sandy Smith, Republican candidate for Congress in North Carolina’s newly redrawn 1st Congressional district.

I always suspected the Dems were just commies in disguise.

_But boy, they took off the disguise this year, haven't they?_

_The Dems are no longer an American political party_. They are a party of Socialists, who condone racism against Jews, who make excuses for tyrannical regimes like Castro's.

It appears Socialist Bernie Sanders will win the Dem nomination for President.

I can't wait to run against his acolyte, G.K. Butterfield, in North Carolina's newly redrawn First District!

I can't wait to run against Butterfield as President Trump contrasts his record of accomplishments against Bernie Sanders' adoring love for Castro's Cuba, Maduro's Venezuela and the Soviet Union.

This is our great opportunity to make sure Nancy Pelosi never gets the Speaker's gavel again. [Let's save our country!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hi9ko6nBOZNxmng&b=dG9Ur5cUpoKov_TnLsrwdg)

Can you help me take this swing district back, [with your maximum contribution](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hi9ko6nBOZNxmng&b=dG9Ur5cUpoKov_TnLsrwdg) of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000, or even $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple?

Can you [show your support](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hi9ko6nBOZNxmng&b=dG9Ur5cUpoKov_TnLsrwdg) of our Constitution and our President, with the largest contribution you can make? Anything you can give is much appreciated!

[Your contribution will make a BIG difference here](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hi9ko6nBOZNxmng&b=dG9Ur5cUpoKov_TnLsrwdg). Let’s go beat the Democrats together- with YOUR help!

[Can you show your support of our Constitution and our President, with the largest contribution you can make?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hi9ko6nBOZNxmng&b=dG9Ur5cUpoKov_TnLsrwdg)

Taking our country back starts right here. As always, [I am grateful for your support](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=InYvV&m=hi9ko6nBOZNxmng&b=dG9Ur5cUpoKov_TnLsrwdg).

For God and Country,

**[Will you make your first donation today to make sure MJ has everything she needs at this crucial point in the race?*](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489052b/7f51f7bc/4de563d9/4ef1ab55/2470352067/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk2NSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200225.1nd__965__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

We have a week to get every last undecided voter we can to come out to the polls for MJ. We're counting on _your help_ to get them engaged and ready to come together in the fight to beat Sen. Cornyn this November.

Beating Sen. Cornyn -- who's spent nearly 20 years in Washington selling Texans out to special interests -- is critical to protecting and expanding health care coverage, lowering drug prices, and taking action on climate change.

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: Over the weekend, Senator Collins attended a closed door, fundraising dinner with GOP leaders -- including Paul LePage.
body:
Remember Paul LePage?

Friends -- Over the weekend, Senator Collins attended a closed door fundraising dinner with GOP leaders -- _including Paul LePage_.
Remember Paul LePage?
He's Maine's former Republican governor who calls himself "Donald Trump before Trump became popular." He made national headlines when he called people of color "the enemy," and once suggested black men were coming to Maine to sell drugs and impregnate white women.
**He also endorsed Susan Collins and is doing everything he can to help her win reelection. Here 's the rest of Collins' lineup:**
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/6580299f/4bef7a87/6d140b8f/287fa1f9/3369917878/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMjUtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200225-1-full")
Meanwhile, Sara Gideon has been endorsed by EMILY's List, End Citizens United, dozens of state representatives and senators, and thousands of grassroots supporters like you.
So yeah...we can take them.
**[But we need your help to do it. So please, make a $3 contribution today. Sara is counting on you.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/6580299f/4bef7a87/6d140b8f/287fa1f9/3369917878/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMjUtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200225-1-full")**
Susan Collins may have Paul LePage, and Donald Trump, and Mitch McConnell -- but we have you, and that's what's going to make a difference.
Thank you for being a part of this team.
\- Team Sara
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/6580299f/4bef7a87/6d140b8f/287fa1f9/3369917878/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMDAyMjUtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gideon2020?refcode=em200225-1-full")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/6580299f/4bef7a87/6d140b8f/287fa1f8/3369917878/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/6580299f/4bef7a87/6d140b8f/287fa1fe/3369917878/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: After Raucous Welcome in India, Trump Clinches $3 Billion Military Equipment Sale
body:
"U.S. President Donald Trump said on Tuesday that India will buy $3 billion worth of military equipment, including..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d3a1672d51&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **After Raucous Welcome in India, Trump Clinches $3 Billion Military Equipment Sale**

“U.S. President Donald Trump said on Tuesday that India will buy $3 billion worth of military equipment, including attack helicopters, as the two countries deepen defense and commercial ties in an attempt to balance the weight of China in the region,” Steve Holland and Aftab Ahmed report for _Reuters_.

Today, President Trump and Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi sat down for one-on-one talks. President Trump said that there is momentum toward a massive trade deal.

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c6f223bed3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “U.S. first lady Melania Trump visited on Tuesday a government school in the Indian capital of New Delhi that teaches a special ‘happiness curriculum’, rooted in mindfulness practices.” The First Lady said that “it is very inspiring to me that the students here begin each day (with) mindfulness,” Sunil Kataria reports for [_Reuters_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=95bff86a3a&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “After several resounding judicial victories,” the Trump Administration this week can begin implementing its new immigration rule, Inadmissibility on Public Charge Grounds. “Not only does this final rule enforce an Act of Congress, but it also reaffirms core American values, such as hard work, self-sufficiency, and perseverance,” Acting Deputy Secretary of Homeland Security Ken Cuccinelli writes in [_The Hill_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e662c6a4bd&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| School choice, a top priority for President Trump, can help save students from politicized classrooms. In Seattle, a new proposed “math ethnic studies” framework would organize its curriculum around themes such as “Power and Oppression” and “History of Resistance and Liberation.” If that sounds far-fetched, “it has become far more common in K–12 schools,” Matt Beienburg of the Goldwater Institute writes for [_National Review_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ec27e32388&e=3ee4985eea).

|

clean_body: "U.S. President Donald Trump said on Tuesday that India will buy $3 billion worth of military equipment, including..." | | | | | | | After Raucous Welcome in India, Trump Clinches $3 Billion Military Equipment Sale “U.S. President Donald Trump said on Tuesday that India will buy $3 billion worth of military equipment, including attack helicopters, as the two countries deepen defense and commercial ties in an attempt to balance the weight of China in the region,” Steve Holland and Aftab Ahmed report for Reuters. Today, President Trump and Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi sat down for one-on-one talks. President Trump said that there is momentum toward a massive trade deal. | | “U.S. first lady Melania Trump visited on Tuesday a government school in the Indian capital of New Delhi that teaches a special ‘happiness curriculum’, rooted in mindfulness practices.” The First Lady said that “it is very inspiring to me that the students here begin each day (with) mindfulness,” Sunil Kataria reports for . | | “After several resounding judicial victories,” the Trump Administration this week can begin implementing its new immigration rule, Inadmissibility on Public Charge Grounds. “Not only does this final rule enforce an Act of Congress, but it also reaffirms core American values, such as hard work, self-sufficiency, and perseverance,” Acting Deputy Secretary of Homeland Security Ken Cuccinelli writes in . | | School choice, a top priority for President Trump, can help save students from politicized classrooms. In Seattle, a new proposed “math ethnic studies” framework would organize its curriculum around themes such as “Power and Oppression” and “History of Resistance and Liberation.” If that sounds far-fetched, “it has become far more common in K–12 schools,” Matt Beienburg of the Goldwater Institute writes for . | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

**Using hundreds of thousands of dollars in profits from Wall Street and drug companies, Sara Jacobs is now running TV ads to promote a Republican candidate in the race for CA-53. It’s an attempt to BLOCK Georgette Gómez from reaching the run-off.**

**[Will you chip in $3 to help us counter Sara Jacobs cynical ploy to manipulate voters by boosting a Republican candidate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15413693/162661817/1136511447?refcode=em-200225-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODk3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjRkYjNmOC0xOTU4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Qxq14IsFIzYxbpyq_OKMohd0vxJGG5CFnCd1KXmBWU=)**

**»** Now, she’s dropping massive sums in order to manipulate the vote outcome. **[Will you help keep this election honest by making an urgent $3 donation to Georgette right away? name: Progressive Majority
subject: We can't let Trump and the GOP do this to the next decade of our elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Progressive Majority PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter \-- Republicans know that they aren't winning on ideas: when more people vote, and more votes are counted, Democrats win. That's why they've put all their efforts into rigging the game through voter suppression and partisan gerrymandering. Just last week, Trump's re-election campaign and the RNC announced they'll be spending more than $10 million to challenge pro-voting rights lawsuits. The RNC chair called voter suppression a "myth," but they're doing whatever they can to ensure they can keep suppressing votes and stealing elections for the next decade after the 2020 census redistricting. **If we don 't stop their gerrymandering with independent redistricting commissions now, we'll lose the House majority, state legislatures, and all hope of national progressive momentum for a decade. ** [**If you believe we need non-partisan redistricting committees in every state to ensure fair elections and to ensure that every vote matters, we need your voice now. If we lose, the GOP can solidify its power without electoral consequences for a generation. We need YOU to take a stand today.**](https://act.progressivemajoritypac.com/page/m/3f9a5c40/5360b1c8/2d4d6bcd/b071e5c/2141532426/VEsH/?g=RdxxUK0LBwxeO7oKxQx0RTA "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-demand-nonpartisan-redistricting-committees-in-every-us-state-to-prevent-rigged-district-maps?redirect=https://s.surveyplanet.com/NoyttnSK") Thank YOU for being part of the fight, Progressive Majority | **[SIGN THE PETITION](https://act.progressivemajoritypac.com/page/m/3f9a5c40/5360b1c8/2d4d6bcd/b071e5c/2141532426/VEsE/?g=RdxxUK0LBwxeO7oKxQx0RTA "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-demand-nonpartisan-redistricting-committees-in-every-us-state-to-prevent-rigged-district-maps?redirect=https://s.surveyplanet.com/NoyttnSK")**

Time and again, Gardner has proven his allegiance to Donald Trump over the people of Colorado. So Trump, McConnell, and their billionaire friends will spend whatever it takes to keep their favorite yes-man in Congress.
**This race is the best chance Democrats have to flip a seat and take back the majority. We can 't afford to give that up because we missed our fundraising goal. Donate $10 (or more!) right now to help us raise $500,000 by Saturday.**

\- Team Monika
| | | Monika Johnson-Hostler is running for Congress to give the people of North Carolina's 2nd District a representative who will listen, work hard, and stay true to their word, doing what's best for the district. For Monika Johnson-Hostler, serving people is about integrity, and that's what she'll bring to Congress. name: Stars and Stripes Forever PAC
subject: Did you see this, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stars & Stripes Forever PAC
body:
Peter, I really think you must've missed this because... * |
Dear Peter, You've been one of our most dedicated and reliable partners -- and I'm so thankful for your commitment to our critical mission... **...but I noticed you have NOT yet Renewed Your Support for 2020.** Our highly-effective minority voter outreach radio ads have been airing in key minority markets in crucial swing states **since August** \-- and we just launched new ads in Michigan supporting veteran John James for U.S. Senate. **Peter, it's absolutely crucial we stay**ON THE AIR** all the way up through Election Day...** [...that's why I'm hoping and praying you'll **RENEW YOUR SUPPORT FOR 2020** with a ONE-TIME or a MONTHLY donation of $20.20 today!](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEHrvh&mc=9y&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=8&z=Et3zWN&) | | [Renew Your Support with a _Monthly_ Donation of $20.20 Now ››](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEHrKY&mc=9y&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=I&z=EMxx5n&)
---
| [Renew Your Support with a _One-Time_ Donation of $20.20 Now ››](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEHrvh&mc=9y&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=8&z=EF5ByDu&)
---
**With Michael Bloomberg dumping _$2 BILLION_ into defeating President Trump this election, we really need you now more than ever, Peter!**
**This Friday is the DEADLINE, so I hope to see your response soon.**
_For America,_
\- John
P.S. _My original message to you with more details is below..._

* * *
| | |
A message from...
---
John Philip Sousa IV
National Chairman of Stars and Stripes Forever PAC
Formerly the 2016 Committee and National Draft Ben Carson for President Committee
Peter, And so it begins... We've officially entered the Primary season with Iowa, New Hampshire, and Nevada behind us -- and it's still anyone's guess who the eventual Democratic nominee will be... **...but you and I don't have to wait to know that the nominee will be a tax-and-spend liberal who wants to return our country back to the Obama days...**_or worse_**!** [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEHrKY&mc=9y&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=I&z=EGWAKi&) And if that's not bad enough -- now we have a liberal, gun-grabbing, "nanny"-state billionaire to contend with because... Michael Bloomberg has Committed to Spend $2 BILLION to Defeat President Trump this Election! Bloomberg's leaked strategy is to flood the states that Trump won by slim margins in 2016 including Wisconsin, Michigan, and Pennsylvania... **...which all states where you and I helped Trump win by convincing minorities to vote for the President in unprecedented numbers. In fact...** Our minority voter outreach campaign (_inspired by Dr. Carson's candidacy_) turned out to be CRUCIAL in defeating Hillary Clinton and electing Donald Trump as President [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEHrKY&mc=9y&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=I&z=EISyzl6&) Peter, you've been one of our most dedicated and reliable partners \-- and I truly believe that without your help **Donald Trump would not have won.** You should be proud that you played such a vital role in making President Trump's victory possible because without you... ...we'd be suffocating under Hillary Clinton's iron-fisted regime, the Supreme Court would've shifted far-Left for decades to come, and our beloved nation would've likely never recovered. [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEHrKY&mc=9y&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=I&z=Eh64yo9&) It's in that same spirit of saving America from radical leftists that I'm writing to you today, Peter. You see... Our Mission to Reach Out to Minority Voters Didn't End with the Election of Donald Trump In fact, the Left's horrific slide into radical socialism, unveiled hatred for America, scorched-Earth tactics, and vile assault of President Trump has added a **new sense of urgency** and **higher stakes** to our mission. That's why we've continued our highly-successful minority outreach and radio advertising campaign to expose the Left's race-baiting lies and convince minorities to abandon the Democratic Party forever... ...a campaign that was inspired by Dr. Ben Carson's presidential and our historic effort to draft him to "Run Ben Run"! began with the first successful Presidential draft effort since Barry Gold Every election, Democrats promise minority voters the moon and the stars in return for their votes. Then, once the election is over, they abandon their promises and turn their backs on the minority voters who secured their victory. And if that doesn't work, Democrats just slander Republicans as racists to **SCARE** minorities into voting for liberals who DO NOT share their values. [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEHrKY&mc=9y&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=I&z=EFTvQlf&) But we're fed up with the Democrats' never-ending lies, ruthless scare-tactics, and race-baiting slander of conservatives... ...and we're **fighting back** by reaching out to minority voters with the truth that the lying Democrats offer little more than bribes, broken promises, and failed policies that lead to nothing but more of the same: disappointment, lousy schools, poverty, victimization, and anger. [Peter, I'm praying you'll RENEW YOUR SUPPORT FOR 2020 to help win this critical fight, but first let me explain just what is at stake.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEHrKY&mc=9y&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=I&z=EBqfIb7&) [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEHrKY&mc=9y&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=I&z=EQObhzJ&) As you know, hundreds of thousands of patriotic Americans like you made history when we convinced Dr. Ben Carson to run for President in 2016. **Together, we became the first successful Presidential draft effort since Barry Goldwater in 1964...** **...and we succeeded beyond anyone's wildest expectations in our ability to recruit minority voters to the Republican Party.** Since 2013, we have invested millions of dollars on radio, television and print advertisements, billboards, books and issue guides to minority voters exposing the **race-baiting lies** liberals have been spoon-feeding them about Republicans and our values for decades... And the results have been incredible. Our campaign proven, _time and time again_ , that radio outreach program to Blacks, Asians, Latinos/Hispanics and Women is NOT a "waste of time" as the talking heads and overpaid political consultants have been claiming for years. In fact, recent polling puts Trump's approval ratings at an astonishing 35 percent with Black Voters, 38 percent with Hispanics and 28 percent with Asians. [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEHrKY&mc=9y&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=I&z=EzXNQ5I&) **If President Trump ends up with even HALF of these numbers, then there's _NO WAY_ the Democrats can win this election.** **But we only have eight short months to continue chipping away at the Democrats base enough to secure a second term for President Trump.** [That's why I'm counting on you to RENEW YOUR SUPPORT FOR 2020 to keep our highly-successful minority outreach campaign RUNNING STRONG up through Election Day!](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEHrKY&mc=9y&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=I&z=EVkyBEG&) | | [Renew Your Support with a _Monthly_ Donation of $20.20 Now ››](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEHrKY&mc=9y&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=I&z=EwRAsD&)
---
| [Renew Your Support with a _One-Time_ Gift of $ Now ››](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEHrvh&mc=9y&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=8&z=EhmszGW&)
---
I don't need to tell you that Stars and Stripes Forever PAC can't stand up to Bloomberg's **$2 BILLION** , but _we don't have to_ because...
...our cost-effective and highly-targeted strategy (_which provided Trump the margin of victory in crucial swing states in 2016_) WILL work again for his re-election.
Thanks to the support of thousands of patriotic Americans like you, Peter, our radio ads have been airing across the country **_since August_** \-- blasting out the TRUTH to carefully selected and key minority markets in crucial swing states and important Congressional races.
We're ON THE AIR right now in Alabama, California, Iowa, Maine, New Mexico, and Minnesota...
...and we just launched in Michigan, a _critical swing state_ where Trump-endorsed, black conservative, businessman, and veteran **John James** has a _REAL SHOT_ at taking back a U.S. Senate seat from the Democrats.
| | _"He's SPECTACULAR. Rarely have I seen a candidate with such great potential. West Point graduate, successful businessman, and an African American leader...**_He will be a star_**."_

\- President Trump on John James | [](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEHrKY&mc=9y&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=I&z=EGHMtgi&)
---|---
[](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEHrKY&mc=9y&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=I&z=EwSTCUr&)
Dr. Ben Carson, Vice President Pence, and U.S. Senate candidate John James visiting Dr. Carson's childhood home in Detroit.
[But we MUST do more if we're going to fight back against Bloomberg's BILLIONS and push President Trump to reelection victory.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEHrKY&mc=9y&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=I&z=EJQpwlC&)
Not only do we need the $16,280/month to keep our current radio ads ON THE AIR...
...but we REALLY need to **DOUBLE DOWN** on the number of spots we're running and expand into other crucial swing states and races across the country.
Peter, you've been one of our most dedicated and reliable partners \-- and I pray you'll continue your support all the way up through Election Day.
We really need you, Peter, now more than ever!
[So please RENEW YOUR SUPPORT FOR 2020 with a _monthly_ donation of $20.20 through Election Day (_your monthly donation will automatically end on Nov 3_)...](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEHrKY&mc=9y&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=I&z=EtYpwDj&)
[...or RENEW YOUR SUPPORT FOR 2020 with an emergency, one-time donation of $20.20 today.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEHrvh&mc=9y&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=8&z=Ezxmtcs&)
I pray I will hear back from you shortly.
| _Urgently,_

John Philip Sousa IV
_National Chairman, Stars & Stripes Forever PAC_
---|---
P.S. I hope that you will give my request thoughtful consideration, Peter. **We truly need you on our team, now more than ever!**
Our country can't afford the price we'll pay if Joe Biden, Bernie Sanders, or Elizabeth Warren defeats President Trump! We NEED four more years of America First policies that are Making America Great Again.
[So please RENEW YOUR SUPPORT FOR 2020 with a _monthly_ donation of $20.20 through Election Day (_your monthly donation will automatically end on Nov 3_)...](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEHrKY&mc=9y&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=I&z=EFkVQ16&)
[...or RENEW YOUR SUPPORT FOR 2020 with an emergency, one-time donation of $20.20 today.](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SEHrvh&mc=9y&s=sOSe3V&u=z93TV&y=8&z=EGlXySA&)
Thank you for your time, consideration, and of course, your support.

clean_body: Peter, I really think you must've missed this because... | Dear Peter, You've been one of our most dedicated and reliable partners -- and I'm so thankful for your commitment to our critical mission... ...but I noticed you have NOT yet Renewed Your Support for 2020. Our highly-effective minority voter outreach radio ads have been airing in key minority markets in crucial swing states since August \-- and we just launched new ads in Michigan supporting veteran John James for U.S. Senate. Peter, it's absolutely crucial we stayON THE AIR all the way up through Election Day... & | | & | & With Michael Bloomberg dumping $2 BILLION into defeating President Trump this election, we really need you now more than ever, Peter! This Friday is the DEADLINE, so I hope to see your response soon. For America, \- John P.S. My original message to you with more details is below... | | | A message from... John Philip Sousa IV National Chairman of Stars and Stripes Forever PAC Formerly the 2016 Committee and National Draft Ben Carson for President Committee Peter, And so it begins... We've officially entered the Primary season with Iowa, New Hampshire, and Nevada behind us -- and it's still anyone's guess who the eventual Democratic nominee will be... ...but you and I don't have to wait to know that the nominee will be a tax-and-spend liberal who wants to return our country back to the Obama days...or worse! & And if that's not bad enough -- now we have a liberal, gun-grabbing, "nanny"-state billionaire to contend with because... Michael Bloomberg has Committed to Spend $2 BILLION to Defeat President Trump this Election! Bloomberg's leaked strategy is to flood the states that Trump won by slim margins in 2016 including Wisconsin, Michigan, and Pennsylvania... ...which all states where you and I helped Trump win by convincing minorities to vote for the President in unprecedented numbers. In fact... Our minority voter outreach campaign (inspired by Dr. Carson's candidacy) turned out to be CRUCIAL in defeating Hillary Clinton and electing Donald Trump as President & Peter, you've been one of our most dedicated and reliable partners \-- and I truly believe that without your help Donald Trump would not have won. You should be proud that you played such a vital role in making President Trump's victory possible because without you... ...we'd be suffocating under Hillary Clinton's iron-fisted regime, the Supreme Court would've shifted far-Left for decades to come, and our beloved nation would've likely never recovered. & It's in that same spirit of saving America from radical leftists that I'm writing to you today, Peter. You see... Our Mission to Reach Out to Minority Voters Didn't End with the Election of Donald Trump In fact, the Left's horrific slide into radical socialism, unveiled hatred for America, scorched-Earth tactics, and vile assault of President Trump has added a new sense of urgency and higher stakes to our mission. That's why we've continued our highly-successful minority outreach and radio advertising campaign to expose the Left's race-baiting lies and convince minorities to abandon the Democratic Party forever... ...a campaign that was inspired by Dr. Ben Carson's presidential and our historic effort to draft him to "Run Ben Run"! began with the first successful Presidential draft effort since Barry Gold Every election, Democrats promise minority voters the moon and the stars in return for their votes. Then, once the election is over, they abandon their promises and turn their backs on the minority voters who secured their victory. And if that doesn't work, Democrats just slander Republicans as racists to SCARE minorities into voting for liberals who DO NOT share their values. & But we're fed up with the Democrats' never-ending lies, ruthless scare-tactics, and race-baiting slander of conservatives... ...and we're fighting back by reaching out to minority voters with the truth that the lying Democrats offer little more than bribes, broken promises, and failed policies that lead to nothing but more of the same: disappointment, lousy schools, poverty, victimization, and anger. & & As you know, hundreds of thousands of patriotic Americans like you made history when we convinced Dr. Ben Carson to run for President in 2016. Together, we became the first successful Presidential draft effort since Barry Goldwater in 1964... ...and we succeeded beyond anyone's wildest expectations in our ability to recruit minority voters to the Republican Party. Since 2013, we have invested millions of dollars on radio, television and print advertisements, billboards, books and issue guides to minority voters exposing the race-baiting lies liberals have been spoon-feeding them about Republicans and our values for decades... And the results have been incredible. Our campaign proven, time and time again , that radio outreach program to Blacks, Asians, Latinos/Hispanics and Women is NOT a "waste of time" as the talking heads and overpaid political consultants have been claiming for years. In fact, recent polling puts Trump's approval ratings at an astonishing 35 percent with Black Voters, 38 percent with Hispanics and 28 percent with Asians. & If President Trump ends up with even HALF of these numbers, then there's NO WAY the Democrats can win this election. But we only have eight short months to continue chipping away at the Democrats base enough to secure a second term for President Trump. & | | & | & I don't need to tell you that Stars and Stripes Forever PAC can't stand up to Bloomberg's $2 BILLION , but we don't have to because... ...our cost-effective and highly-targeted strategy (which provided Trump the margin of victory in crucial swing states in 2016) WILL work again for his re-election. Thanks to the support of thousands of patriotic Americans like you, Peter, our radio ads have been airing across the country since August \-- blasting out the TRUTH to carefully selected and key minority markets in crucial swing states and important Congressional races. We're ON THE AIR right now in Alabama, California, Iowa, Maine, New Mexico, and Minnesota... ...and we just launched in Michigan, a critical swing state where Trump-endorsed, black conservative, businessman, and veteran John James has a REAL SHOT at taking back a U.S. Senate seat from the Democrats. | | "He's SPECTACULAR. Rarely have I seen a candidate with such great potential. West Point graduate, successful businessman, and an African American leader...He will be a star." \- President Trump on John James | & ---|--- & Dr. Ben Carson, Vice President Pence, and U.S. Senate candidate John James visiting Dr. Carson's childhood home in Detroit. & Not only do we need the $16,280/month to keep our current radio ads ON THE AIR... ...but we REALLY need to DOUBLE DOWN on the number of spots we're running and expand into other crucial swing states and races across the country. Peter, you've been one of our most dedicated and reliable partners \-- and I pray you'll continue your support all the way up through Election Day. We really need you, Peter, now more than ever! & & I pray I will hear back from you shortly. | Urgently, John Philip Sousa IV National Chairman, Stars & Stripes Forever PAC ---|--- P.S. I hope that you will give my request thoughtful consideration, Peter. We truly need you on our team, now more than ever! Our country can't afford the price we'll pay if Joe Biden, Bernie Sanders, or Elizabeth Warren defeats President Trump! | Peter,
