| "In many ways," says Democratic Presidential frontrunner, Bernie Sanders, "very significant ways, we're not. [We're not great](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=00132EKUG-w8KNsiBbjTyfQk4PXYvAOhOx8arM1WUYcGkzHhOtMpkfX3L3fmDYLI72-OSSZcNvZJQBHO92g0j4SvxfEOrJ09QRV97JGa7KGBR4-Oxv8vzCiENJIY2Y3k4qhQyBrt3Akz_l5cmm1uX5_48m_xLxFHg71wqwjn5L6MkaUHNmNpGFDIO-CvH-si4ZTeavfZnjc4-BMcomhuUCIJvGbFcUVGGhqmJSZPhJNsbv_bVx__i6bL05gh6viruIE1DEKD39mvCdx2g383ZgrHg==&c=2hit0IB6j0iq4Je4XUsS9ZS5Y4aT9Xb0w2Du4UYJVMip-N2yq1DHgw==&ch=8roQ4dSy9MmcGUc130sodQ9ezFSz8oz4ciM34G6dCD4RdoAxcW1JzQ==)."
You're reading that right, folks. The likely Democratic nominee and new leader of Rep. Xochitl Torres Small's party says America is NOT great.
How does Xochitl's party leader plan to make America great? For starters, Bernie plans to:

* Let murderers vote from prison;
* Abolish ICE and support sanctuary cities;
* Raise trillions in new taxes; and
* Stomp all over your Second Amendment rights.

The cherry on top? Bernie plans to ban fracking and support job-killing policies like the Green New Deal that would bankrupt our state.

name: Tim
subject: The cruelest budget I've ever seen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
Trump's attacks on seniors are just the beginning | | Team, President Trump recently released his new federal budget. It includes reckless cuts to some of our most vital government programs, and it still does not make up for the $1.5 trillion that the GOP tax scam gave away to billionaires and big corporations. Central to Trump's plan is **his cruel proposal to dismantle Medicaid.** These cuts would be catastrophic for seniors, people with disabilities, and low-income Americans, who could be left without health coverage. The budget also includes **cuts to Medicare spending and Social Security Disability Insurance, breaking one of Trump 's key campaign promises.** Trump has even slashed funds for Meals on Wheels, and for programs that help seniors fight elder abuse & keep the heat on in winter. The president's cruel cutbacks aren't limited to seniors:
* The budget eliminates important student loan forgiveness programs and increases student loan debt by billions of dollars, at a time when 83% of Americans say they can't afford the rising cost of college
* It slashes the Environmental Protection Agency budget by more than a quarter, despite the increasing threat of climate-related disasters
* It even cuts money for the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention in the middle of the coronavirus outbreak

This budget is a clear representation of Republicans' priorities. **They want to cut services for our most vulnerable friends and neighbors to pay for their tax breaks for the wealthy.** We desperately need a different vision for this country. That's why it's imperative that we win in November. **[Can you pitch in $13, or whatever you can spare, to fight back against Donald Trump's cruel proposals?](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb3/5486deaa/3e2c7d73/dcb9d11/4086740377/VEsH/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ **[Pitch in $50->](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb3/5486deaa/3e2c7d73/dcb9d12/4086740377/VEsC/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ **[Pitch in $100->](https://timryan.bsd.net/page/m/d7a9bb3/5486deaa/3e2c7d73/dcb9d15/4086740377/VEsD/?g=i0wvQ1H8x8Va89sNxWeKKQ Our race here in OH-13 is exactly the kind of contest that Democrats need to win if we're going to hold on to the House. **Our campaign has been declared a "race to watch" by prognosticators. I 'm counting on the support of people like you to help me defend our district.** Thank you for all you do, \-- Tim

#
Meet Tim Ryan
---
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| | **Tim Ryan for Congress**

If you can, send in a donation right now to send a clear message to Donald Trump that Democrats are ready to win big this November.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/corybooker-2020-nancypelosi-split?refcode=em_fr_20200225_PHQ_20200225-fr-PHQ-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** It's going to take all hands on deck to maintain control of the House, win back the Senate, and defeat Donald Trump. Janessa Goldbeck (CA-53), Gina Ortiz Jones (TX-23), and Kim Olson (TX-24) are all working around the clock to win their primaries on March 3rd and they need our help. [**Can you rush a donation before midnight tonight to make sure we can support our candidates as they sprint down the homestretch?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15418399/162715259/-403937030?refcode=20200225_SA_EOM2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTEyZGIxOC0zMjU4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xLeVHeR1ajRBaKva7VH5XBtogohxhfUpxR5xlADqqvE=) Your support will allow us to hit our $15,000 fundraising goal and coordinate support for our candidates before Super Tuesday. Thank you! Craig Harrington
National Political Director
Serve America \-----FWD----- Friend, Did you see the Democratic debate last week? The remaining contenders in this race for the Democratic nomination debated right before the Nevada caucus. While there are clearly some strong candidates in this race, and any of them would be far better than Donald Trump, we couldn’t help but notice that there was no mention of national security or foreign policy in the last debate. Voters in this election have clearly shown they care about health care and the economy. But some of the worst damage Donald Trump has done has been to our national security, our ability to conduct foreign policy with our allies around the world, and our standing as a world leader. It’s why we worked so hard in 2018 to elect a new generation of leaders who have service and foreign policy experience. And it’s why our mission is to do the same thing in 2020. **As many of our endorsed candidates approach their March primaries, we’ve set an important end-of-month fundraising goal to make sure we have the resources to support them.[Can you help us raise $15,000 before midnight on February 29th?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15418400/162715260/-403937030?refcode=20200225_SA_EOM1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTEyZGIxOC0zMjU4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xLeVHeR1ajRBaKva7VH5XBtogohxhfUpxR5xlADqqvE=)** [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15418401/162715261/1338765119?refcode=20200225_SA_EOM1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTEyZGIxOC0zMjU4LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xLeVHeR1ajRBaKva7VH5XBtogohxhfUpxR5xlADqqvE=)

clean_body: | | | Friend, I didn’t want the day to end without sending you a note to remind you that this is the last chance to make contributions to our endorsed candidates who have primaries on Super Tuesday. Janessa Goldbeck (CA-53), Gina Ortiz Jones (TX-23), and Kim Olson (TX-24) are all working around the clock to win their primaries on March 3rd and they need our help. = Your support will allow us to hit our $15,000 fundraising goal and coordinate support for our candidates before Super Tuesday. Thank you! Craig Harrington National Political Director Serve America \-----FWD----- Friend, Did you see the Democratic debate last week? The remaining contenders in this race for the Democratic nomination debated right before the Nevada caucus. While there are clearly some strong candidates in this race, and any of them would be far better than Donald Trump, we couldn’t help but notice that there was no mention of national security or foreign policy in the last debate. Voters in this election have clearly shown they care about health care and the economy. But some of the worst damage Donald Trump has done has been to our national security, our ability to conduct foreign policy with our allies around the world, and our standing as a world leader. It’s why we worked so hard in 2018 to elect a new generation of leaders who have service and foreign policy experience. And it’s why our mission is to do the same thing in 2020. As many of our endorsed candidates approach their March primaries, we’ve set an important end-of-month fundraising goal to make sure we have the resources to support them.= = Your support allows us to make investments in field programs, advertisements, and voter outreach on behalf of our incredible challengers and incumbents as we approach their respective elections. Thank you for whatever you can give today, Serve America = | | | | ---|---|---|--- If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . | Paid for by Serve America Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Serve America PAC, Janessa Goldbeck for Congress, Friends for Zahra Karinshak, Josh Hicks for Congress, Friends of Dan Feehan, Jackie Gordon for Congress, Nikki Foster for OH, Gina Ortiz Jones for Congress, Kim for Congress, and Kahele for Congress Serve America Victory Fund PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

name: Hunt for Congress
subject: See you in Jersey Village tomorrow!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Our campaign is fully committed to finishing this campaign just as strongly as we started. We're going to keep pushing as hard as possible until polls close at 7:00pm on March 3rd.

So, if you haven't met Wesley yet, have a new question for him or just want to show your support for our campaign, please join us TOMORROW, February 26th at Los Cucos in Jersey Village at 6:00pm.

[Click here to RSVP](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=bcae809cb0b8418e9c1afcc442bef348&_e=82h770hL8K1qmH_LE7b7MYHTn5G9JBJxPeBh34hxiX2w5MMZUIVGec0Anp4zJYIAbmnAQzFxnw-gyvLmJ9O7wG2VshXjC7unLktuimxE3VWUtPPiy6b-APbykU12iQKv3x3RnDOt8ItDZjq6l42Fgkaj0pegYHPW3hsGKOd1XtRKWWB14KCXRRzVVhUz6_WSJqaLQ4WluHYjvEWbDFmNF2AgfF-7HIFZSDe28ZI_KygbZu1II-lkTVavoUkYoDGMqLdgDeE-uvgQrh2itQYu_Liszz04CflMmO-nCrOHT89ld6uBG-4vLBREIlNIcfnZ)

We'll provide food and beverages as we continue our effort to meet 7th District voters, answer your questions and tell you our plan to take back the 7th District.

Can't wait to see you there!

Sincerely,
Team Hunt

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Preston is right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We DON'T have much time left, and there are still undecided voters across Texas we need to reach within the next 7 days.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890535/7f51f7bc/4de63078/4ef1ac0d/638334337/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter, Preston's right. **We DON 'T have much time left, and there are still undecided voters across Texas we need to reach within the next 7 days. **

With so little time left, every donation you pitch in is a weight off my shoulders. Instead of worrying about how I'm gonna get out there and talk to voters, I can just do it.

[**Thank you for helping power this campaign -- I truly couldn 't do this without you.**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890535/7f51f7bc/4de63078/4ef1ac0c/638334337/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk3MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200225.2nd__971__&amount=10&recurring=true")

\-- MJ \---------- Forwarded Message ----------
From: **Preston, Team MJ**
Subject: What we need to win
> | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890535/7f51f7bc/4de63078/4ef1ac0c/638334337/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk3MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200225.2nd__971__&amount=10&recurring=true")
> ---
> Time's almost up, Peter: **The primary is a week from today.** It's clear MJ has the momentum, but there are still undecided voters across Texas, and we can't take anything for granted. **We HAVE to nominate the candidate with the best shot of defeating Sen. Cornyn -- and that 's MJ!**
>
> **[Will you make your first donation today to make sure MJ has everything she needs at this crucial point in the race?*](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890535/7f51f7bc/4de63078/4ef1ac0c/638334337/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk3MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200225.2nd__971__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
>
> We have a week to get every last undecided voter we can to come out to the polls for MJ. We're counting on _your help_ to get them engaged and ready to come together in the fight to beat Sen. Cornyn this November.
>
> Beating Sen. Cornyn -- who's spent nearly 20 years in Washington selling Texans out to special interests -- is critical to protecting and expanding health care coverage, lowering drug prices, and taking action on climate change.
>
> **And Peter, nominating MJ is _critical_ to beating Sen. Cornyn! We have the momentum, but we need to have you with us now. Please make your first* donation today to make sure MJ is the candidate who takes on and DEFEATS Sen. Cornyn:**
> _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
> ---
> **[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890535/7f51f7bc/4de63078/4ef1ac03/638334337/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk3MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200225.2nd__971__&amount=5")**
> **[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890535/7f51f7bc/4de63078/4ef1ac02/638334337/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk3MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200225.2nd__971__&amount=10")**
> **[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890535/7f51f7bc/4de63078/4ef1ac01/638334337/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk3MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200225.2nd__971__&amount=25")**
> **[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890535/7f51f7bc/4de63078/4ef1ac00/638334337/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk3MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200225.2nd__971__&amount=50")**
> **[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890535/7f51f7bc/4de63078/4ef1ac07/638334337/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk3MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200225.2nd__971__")**
> Preston Elliott,
> Campaign Manager
> MJ for Texas
>
>
>
> _*If you've already contributed to the campaign, thank you so much! Our records are based on donations associated with this email address in our online database, which may take some time to update._

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890535/7f51f7bc/4de63078/4ef1ac0c/638334337/VEsHBQ/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6Ijk3MSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200225.2nd__971__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

subject: Good news/bad news...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
| | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fc68c1ea9d21/its-time-to-run-to-the-fight-6252609?e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| | |
# We'll keep this short.
We have some good news
and some bad news...
We'll start with the **good news**. We have been building some [great momentum](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=906e2bf866&e=1050d051da) and Kansans are ready to send Jake LaTurner to Congress.

When we emailed you last week, we were ~~$10,873~~ short of our goal for February. _**The good news**_ : we are now only _**$2,452**_ short of our goal for February. Will you contribute [$100, $50, or even $20 to help us reach our goal?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=ee4e2cbc29&e=1050d051da)

Now the **bad news**. _We're looking through the list of Jake's February contributors and we haven't seen your name._
---
|
---
| [Add Your Name to the List of Jake's Supporters](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=11b92fd2d5&e=1050d051da "Add Your Name to the List of Jake's Supporters")
---
| We are stronger as a nation when we have conservative leadership in all levels of government, which is why Jake supports Donald J. Trump for President. The Democrats can't even find a member of their own party they like, _**so they are trying to nominate a lifelong socialist!**_ Unfortunately for them, _**America stands for freedom, not Sanders Socialism!**_

Jake is a strong member of the team of Republican fighters helping re-elect President Trump, and he will continue to fight along side him in Washington D.C. as a member of Congress.

[Will you pitch in to send a conservative to Congress to stand with President Trump? Anything helps. $100, $25, or even $10](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=71fac266e5&e=1050d051da).
---
| Thank you for your support!

Yours in the fight,

Kansans for LaTurner
---

name: Bloomberg Debate HQ
subject: Sharing a message from Mike before the debate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Bloomberg 2020
body:
Mike recorded a video message for you.

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=75d6bd6583ca48c09e7d5b1b4fe8ea34&_e=9sMeHbAgcI8qH1LLzs2j-ehDsDZjBfZGXsy7RJFR-6DVa_jNdLudI9aoQhCEbmEV39uA4xsAnDf-dFbP6i2f6rIELTa2IWuaYH_aGEaEhz9V7ofBpSLxhOwWA2T0DWdpEC6VvtV84zsPBuIm1IQt2MaAFDTyRvsTQwXGHPh8At5CTIDNcMSSQhfPvrSXX7wFyw6hE5cRXn2pLfQiksFvrPG2FBrND9rVzAipybtk_fDTCEb_dVQmZeCMk-Js5mO-unkKgkLntsQ3dF3JF-hotci7SGVrXCRqp-QSS0Ncb4UqLmZClfhkxbGt0xJx7eumU8wfgQLss0qSuPuINRrdo4zwgqGjVwDT7evuVa32zfqq-nnIQSoTk2BSO85EKYPLMTYm6GWzC7TdbkFZlLI1cA%3D%3D) Hi there, Tonight's debate is a chance to see why Mike is the best candidate to defeat Donald Trump and start getting big things done. Mike is a proven leader with a history of winning tough fights -- creating jobs, taking on climate change and gun violence, expanding health care, and more. And he has the record to take on Trump and win. _None_ of the other candidates can match Mike's record -- and they _all_ know it. Mike has been inspired by the people he's meeting all across the country who understand this election is a fight we must win -- and he's glad to know you've got his back. [**That's why he wanted to share a special message with you before the debate:**](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=75d6bd6583ca48c09e7d5b1b4fe8ea34&_e=9sMeHbAgcI8qH1LLzs2j-ehDsDZjBfZGXsy7RJFR-6DVa_jNdLudI9aoQhCEbmEV39uA4xsAnDf-dFbP6i2f6rIELTa2IWuaYH_aGEaEhz9V7ofBpSLxhOwWA2T0DWdpEC6VvtV84zsPBuIm1IQt2MaAFDTyRvsTQwXGHPh8At5CTIDNcMSSQhfPvrSXX7wFugta_UHGA2zkVrX7FUgeUrsVGghzTwxYbkHOz32zC0arkl-fjG_g7-92Xdtd06CdRk1TFulqMNPmWf4wEyd6O_TiHZTLvBrJEyJqjSpqlICdJA9Ge_4sUCK4GQk09rXDxoe7ez3rH1dd_gcLIJzrLpNkMC_3hEKcid41qkoBG5C72-8cLOUyr9AUwfO-LgcxogwsTmB8LsGIEyXPn39ZqA%3D%3D) [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=75d6bd6583ca48c09e7d5b1b4fe8ea34&_e=9sMeHbAgcI8qH1LLzs2j-ehDsDZjBfZGXsy7RJFR-6DVa_jNdLudI9aoQhCEbmEV39uA4xsAnDf-dFbP6i2f6rIELTa2IWuaYH_aGEaEhz9V7ofBpSLxhOwWA2T0DWdpEC6VvtV84zsPBuIm1IQt2MaAFDTyRvsTQwXGHPh8At5CTIDNcMSSQhfPvrSXX7wFO7sCfGEQgSVWMjzm0OLKrfPD1Pg7-tV-zbsJ4UkfRGrm_ITrIq7oCDBt9oK_BRYdhS4Ncb6MWcgwSAXFErpAu3LAQ32xl_i-s_UKEpEGwomTNAOATJhZBtrEIFxoqJrhBhI5Jb0cSKrahEsPzrvYl3F57Jr2BASmMz2xX5uH6luZB3zYaoVfY__xodb6bK4oiJTleMVGQNYN4U46qBLmvQ%3D%3D) Check out Mike's message, then text **DEBATE to 80510** for live updates. name: Chris Putnam
subject: Up for the challenge
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PUTNAM FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://sendy
body:
|
---
Hey Team Putnam, It's crazy to think we're just one week away from the March 3rd Republican Primary. It's honestly nerve-wracking to know that all of our hard work will yield results in just 7-days. Those who know me know I always love a challenge. It's why I've spent my career facing them head-on. I spent 30-years in the technology sector, working for some of the largest and most innovative tech firms in the world. **I ran for City Council on a platform of lowering taxes, cutting spending, and instituting term limits on myself and I accomplished every single one.** And now I'm running for Congress against 24-year-incumbent, Kay Granger. When we started this campaign, they said it couldn't be done. But as we've pushed forward, we've also turned heads. Now, we're on track to win next week, and it's all because of people like YOU. **Friend, I need your help one last time to finish this race strong.[Can I count on you to donate just $7 to fuel our final 7 days of the campaign?](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/HMmg2VP763MRh4RcYxeE3dPg/lh0FTxY6vY8923Y9LEL5i763eQ)** We're going to win next week. And when we do, I'll have you to thank. [Chip in now to be part of history!](http://sendy.sentbybeast.com/l/z6892Prjcr4763lvfJKtWfQq6w/HMmg2VP763MRh4RcYxeE3dPg/lh0FTxY6vY8923Y9LEL5i763eQ) God bless, Chris

It's honestly nerve-wracking to know that all of our hard work will yield results in just 7-days. Those who know me know I always love a challenge. It's why I've spent my career facing them head-on. I spent 30-years in the technology sector, working for some of the largest and most innovative tech firms in the world. I ran for City Council on a platform of lowering taxes, cutting spending, and instituting term limits on myself and I accomplished every single one. And now I'm running for Congress against 24-year-incumbent, Kay Granger. When we started this campaign, they said it couldn't be done. But as we've pushed forward, we've also turned heads. Now, we're on track to win next week, and it's all because of people like YOU. Friend, I need your help one last time to finish this race strong. We're going to win next week. And when we do, I'll have you to thank. God bless, Chris * PAID FOR BY PUTNAM FOR CONGRESS

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: President Trump is wheels up from historic India visit
body:
The President and First Lady Melania Trump are now en route back to Washington, D.C., after a productive and awe-inspiring trip to India this week. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1529cc7ffe&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • February 25, 2020
---
| | |
# **President Trump is wheels up from historic India visit**

**The President** and First Lady Melania Trump are now en route back to Washington, D.C., after a productive and awe-inspiring trip to India this week.

**The two-day schedule** was packed with both working meetings and visits to cultural landmarks such as the Taj Mahal. Yesterday, President Trump received a [roaring welcome from over 100,000 people](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c12f4f2e10&e=3ee4985eea) at a rally hosted by Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi.

**“Melania and I** have been awed by the majesty of India and the exceptional kindness and generosity of the Indian people,” President Trump said. “We’ll always remember the magnificent welcome the citizens of your home state showed us upon arrival.”

**📷 PHOTOS:**[President Trump and the First Lady in India!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=dccd0c9937&e=3ee4985eea)

**Earlier today,** the President spoke to reporters about his successful visit and the growing power of the U.S.–India partnership. A few highlights:
* **On India** : “I admire your country tremendously. I respect your Prime Minister tremendously . . . I think that India is going to be a tremendous player [now and] over the next period of 50 years and 100 years.”

* **On economic opportunity** : “We just had a meeting . . . I thought it was a great meeting with some of the biggest businessmen in the world that come from India. They’re agreeing to invest billions and billions of dollars.”

* **On trade** : “We also talked about tariffs because as you know, India is probably the highest-tariff nation in the world, meaning charging tariffs to outsiders. And I said we have to stop that. We have to stop it.”

* **On the Middle East** : “We don't have to act as a police force. We can act as a military force to win—not a military force to just take care of things in that very, very difficult part of the world.”

**As part of President Trump’s** talks with Prime Minister Modi this week, India is set to buy more than $3 _billion_ of advanced American military equipment for its troops. A stronger India will boost U.S. efforts to defeat terrorism and drug trafficking worldwide.

**The President** also teased progress toward a major new trade deal, which would come on the heels of a recent Phase 1 agreement with China and the NAFTA-replacing USMCA.

**“We think we’re at a point** where our relationship is so special with India,” President Trump said alongside Prime Minister Modi. “It has never been as good as it is right now.”

[President Trump: America received an incredible welcome from the people of India!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=77b36b7521&e=3ee4985eea)

**🇺🇸** **🇮🇳****Replay:** [Opening day of the President’s trip ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=904e8f5a80&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **President Trump and First Lady Melania Trump view the reflecting pool as they tour the Taj Mahal** | February 24, 2020
---
|

subject: Tonight's #DemDebate in South Carolina!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, [www
body:
#
Peter,
We're excited to cheer Joe Biden on at tonight's debate in South Carolina ahead of the First in the South primary this Saturday!

We know Joe Biden is the best candidate to take on Donald Trump in November. Joe's plans are both bold and achievable. He's a leader who will always do the right thing and he has a record of getting things done. Joe will be ready on day one to unite the country and make progress on the most important issues we face.

As always, our team at Unite the Country will be live tweeting and sharing Joe's best moments during tonight's #DemDebate. We need your help to make sure Joe's message gets out to as many voters as we can before folks in South Carolina go to the polls this Saturday.

**Will you help us support Joe Biden during the debate?[Follow us on Twitter at @UniteCountryPAC](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df76f8/287b9173/2b05ff97/7e766934/1262143882/VEsH/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "http://twitter.com/unitecountrypac"), share clips & quotes from the debate with your network, and tweet why you're think Joe Biden is the best candidate for president using the hashtags #UniteForBiden and #DemDebate! **

From healthcare to climate change to criminal justice reform, Joe can get the job done in Washington. We'll be reminding voters tonight that Joe is the best candidate to do all of this - and defeat Donald Trump.

Tune in tonight at 8 pm ET and join us on Twitter as we live tweet the #DemDebate!

See you tonight,

Unite the Country

P.S. We are also organizing Joe Biden's supporters online! If you'd like to join our Slack group, please reply to this email.

name: Team Franken
subject: Theresa's Super PAC money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
Last night, the corporate and billionaire-funded Senate Majority PAC -- bankrolled by the likes of Bain Capital -- took out a $400,000 ad buy on behalf of DC's candidate, Theresa Greenfield.
|
---
| |
---

| | Last night, the corporate and billionaire-funded Senate Majority PAC -- bankrolled by the likes of Bain Capital -- took out a $400,000 ad buy on behalf of DC's candidate, Theresa Greenfield. Theresa Greenfield says she's rejecting corporate money. But this is a DC super PAC -- funded by the very money she claims to despise -- interfering in Iowa's US Senate race. Don't want to take our word for it? Here's a quote directly from Theresa's website: "Theresa... won't take a dime from corporate PACs." **Admiral Mike Franken is not taking corporate PAC money, and he has the receipts to prove it.[_Chip in to join our campaign to beat Joni Ernst, and not be beholden to party bosses in Washington._](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24f3/33365068/4a6c6354/3f8be47d/837450176/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200225_darkmoney_em_fr_all_ftrbtn&amount=10")** Here's what is really going on: **__Greenfield receives a "seven-figure TV and digital ad by the Senate Majority PAC" -CNN __** **This Senate Majority PAC raised over $72 million -- from just under 7,000 donations. That 's an average gift of $10,285. And who are it's backers? Hedge-fund billionaires, media moguls, and big pharma. ** Mike runs a clean campaign because, when he's your senator, he wants to shut the door on these special interest groups and represent Iowans. This begins with letting Iowans choose their Senate candidates unimpeded from outside money and power brokers. We need to take dark money out of politics. Let's begin that now. It starts with you. _**[Can you help us raise $40,000 by the end of this month so we can ensure Iowans can compete with the dark money that's pouring in to this race? ](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24f3/33365068/4a6c6354/3f8be47e/837450176/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200225_darkmoney_em_fr_all_L2&amount=10")**_ Thank you, Team Franken | [DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24f3/33365068/4a6c6354/3f8be47f/837450176/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf2020q1?refcode=FRA_20200225_darkmoney_em_fr_all_ftrbtn&amount=10")
---

---

---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: When I cast my vote
body:
Good afternoon Peter,
Last Tuesday, I cast my vote for the 2020 Democratic Primary.

Although I have voted many times over the last two decades, this was the most important time to date.

When I cast my vote, I was not voting on my own behalf; I was voting for the people of District 18. I was voting for Maria, the mother who has to sell pupusas to support her son's band, because the school doesn't have enough funding for it. I voted for the young man who refused to fill out his FASFA application because he didn't want to put his immigrant parents at risk. I voted for Tracy, our hardworking 88-year-old volunteer who comes in multiple times a week to help out a campaign she believes in, because the issues we stand for know no age.
http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=9c8db1fb55-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_24_07_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-9c8db1fb55-32267927

Help us reach more voters (http://actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=9c8db1fb55-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_02_24_07_03&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-9c8db1fb55-32267927) to help them understand why I want to represent them. We want to put more funding into our advertisements and mailers than ever before. clean_body: Good afternoon Peter, Last Tuesday, I cast my vote for the 2020 Democratic Primary. Although I have voted many times over the last two decades, this was the most important time to date. When I cast my vote, I was not voting on my own behalf; I was voting for the people of District 18. I was voting for Maria, the mother who has to sell pupusas to support her son's band, because the school doesn't have enough funding for it. I voted for the young man who refused to fill out his FASFA application because he didn't want to put his immigrant parents at risk. I voted for Tracy, our hardworking 88-year-old volunteer who comes in multiple times a week to help out a campaign she believes in, because the issues we stand for know no age. We have one week left to make our voices heard. Help us reach more voters () to help them understand why I want to represent them. We want to put more funding into our advertisements and mailers than ever before. If all of our supporters chip in $25 today () , we can do this! Chip in $25 () JOIN US This week, more than ever, we'll need your help. Come out and block walk with me, sign up to send text messages or phone bank, or work at your closest polling place to tell voters why a vote for Marc Flores is a vote for the betterment of District 18! Sign up to volunteer today () . Volunteer () If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Express Donate: $5 () Express Donate: $10 () Express Donate: $25 () Or, donate another amount () We'll see you out there! Thank you, Marc ============================================================ Facebook () Facebook () Twitter () Twitter () Instagram () Instagram () Website () Website () Copyright © 2019 Marc Flores for Congress, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Marc Flores for Congress P.O. Box 924332 Houston, TX 77292 ** Add us to your address book ()

Friend,

Our end of month fundraising deadline hits on February 29th, but this month we’re asking for something a little bit different.
[ **Invest $3 in our campaign** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f6b7cdb30edf4f77b072e59c44df30cb&_e=aG5heitwaUyiAv-CpUM78Kov4rqgaUVnksJfcwRIiqb5lAnaLQ7sFuJ29n0GG6MxIEQ3umpoEJ-BOVvVmzfJy8nfzs7kFNL2naDrVpCLSsPcNYsScOI7e6JRRI9wOZbUm7Na45SNbImYhBhXeAOVfmrhQ3U-pgY5kMGCpsaGFS1-m-B8kjZn6l6vtBTmM7SkjziEJ5-0G_wF-EVOWcqTJXj_eRrLZMSzG-3dwGlqPLiRHQOi6iMUIstuZ5z7Jpnz5yTgkTcPdCbOeXqOEVr-n5taNDbgEbwBp4usAcbgsul9vk-YSAOS4pecUjOy_5Wwhh6_pB5dkgaJDcnCF-1a_zxIVThBfVVzpYh3h3RRpGOfS7dA7iNfRD3LjWohRCHKWFvd1Am4MIqlLnGzLtVUGxzOka9C-oFoLIwBxTWCPGmLvHCk7y-DBHAEq8bfG2Ey_PERhJfzafC5PCKa3TVxsz4KCpuZken7Jyt13y9yx3c_hJFsHY21jG--w_eDaSiL)
The Holcomb Crew is made up of Hoosiers across Indiana who believe in Putting People First and driving Indiana forward. We believe that together we can make Indiana a safer, smarter, and more prosperous place for all Hoosiers.

Every member of our crew has invested in our campaign and each donation we ask for is exactly that — an investment. It’s an investment in another four years of a people-first approach, economic success for ALL Hoosiers, and progress towards a 21st century Indiana.

This February, we’re asking for just a $3 investment. With your investment, you’ll be joining with your fellow Hoosiers to help us invest in field staff, advertising and the resources we’ll need to win!

**[If you want to help us continue Putting People First for another four years, please consider investing just $3 in our campaign by using the button below. ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f6b7cdb30edf4f77b072e59c44df30cb&_e=aG5heitwaUyiAv-CpUM78Kov4rqgaUVnksJfcwRIiqb5lAnaLQ7sFuJ29n0GG6MxIEQ3umpoEJ-BOVvVmzfJy8nfzs7kFNL2naDrVpCLSsPcNYsScOI7e6JRRI9wOZbUm7Na45SNbImYhBhXeAOVfmrhQ3U-pgY5kMGCpsaGFS1-m-B8kjZn6l6vtBTmM7SkjziEJ5-0G_wF-EVOWcqTJXj_eRrLZMSzG-3dwGlqPLiRHQOi6iMUIstuZ5z7Jpnz5yTgkTcPdCbOeXqOEVr-nwn4oUBz-kNaNIPPeAJRV1EX0bURZHXgwwQwz6HRlZ_jUI3q4jjp-QqUPiC7Dk2_bJ-7oHnmj2Sj16NKn4us9IWhpz6lzURrMcfhbUevUrDkjkm2lM80PgsqokRhTSvBloXKYZCvXtDMWnNKONzf80lvRVNz5IT3oVZF6x-_sL49zbq_FkScWaYZT48eqojBZxLsHdn8OfFAnSTpHPG9-AcLjVZYVKE9O83JKc58BT7D)**
[ **Invest $3** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=f6b7cdb30edf4f77b072e59c44df30cb&_e=aG5heitwaUyiAv-CpUM78Kov4rqgaUVnksJfcwRIiqb5lAnaLQ7sFuJ29n0GG6MxIEQ3umpoEJ-BOVvVmzfJy8nfzs7kFNL2naDrVpCLSsPcNYsScOI7e6JRRI9wOZbUm7Na45SNbImYhBhXeAOVfmrhQ3U-pgY5kMGCpsaGFS1-m-B8kjZn6l6vtBTmM7SkjziEJ5-0G_wF-EVOWcqTJXj_eRrLZMSzG-3dwGlqPLiRHQOi6iMUIstuZ5z7Jpnz5yTgkTcPdCbOeXqOEVr-nwZZ4qljgRMgjTb1TeVYKeW7V2WyERKf0mxNWgsPVvRAKwB1TvjRa-uT1-uKJ05dAKdlHxlIE8ik0Joki1ACGF1vrvAepu9vXd2onZ-G7tp4NJiNjywkCv4r1FD7HaXXNI1hNHCnUYRlEaeEDygiSUDmtbuhwdtwxBtps0QnJIo1TEkLITcw_NFg4wRUklIGJM9ZX2_QssH-9_IxXxEfahJs9QQtYnSHV43INjISbert)
Thank you for everything you do,
Holcomb Crew
